ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "delivery_info" TEXT /* Delivery information for the order */,
  "date_of_order" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the account that made the order */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Detailed delivery address */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account holder */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance in the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number associated with the account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Billing address for the account */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the account was logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, online payment service) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the payment */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  "payment_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment (e.g., card number, expiration date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the payment method is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the payment method was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the payment method was modified */,
  "minimum_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount that can be processed using this method */,
  "maximum_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount that can be processed using this method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the account that made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was made */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, order payment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "balance_after_transaction" REAL /* Account balance after the transaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "reference_id" TEXT /* Reference ID for the transaction (e.g., order ID, payment ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
